name: Pheasant Pate
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Sprinkle salt and pepper on the outsides of the birds.
3. If the birds have been skinned, place bacon strips over them.
4. Bake in a covered roasting pan with about half an inch of water for 1 to 1.5 hours, or until the meat falls from the bones easily.
5. Cool: Remove all meat and mince it finely using a fine blade of a meat grinder or the metal blade of a food processor.
6. Add grated onion, egg, and butter to the minced meat. Mix in sour cream until thoroughly moistened and spreadable.
7. Add salt and pepper; mix well.
8. Pack the mixture into tightly closed jars and refrigerate or freeze.
